cases.title: Buggy Q-learning terminal bootstrap
cases.error_context: Bellman target should not bootstrap from next-state values when done=True.
cases.expected_title: Q-learning terminal target bootstraps after done=True

seed_payload.title: Q-learning terminal target bootstraps after done=True
seed_payload.raw_error: AssertionError: Q-learning target bootstraps through terminal state; expected reward-only target when done=True.
seed_payload.canonical_fix: Mask the Bellman bootstrap with (1 - done) so terminal transitions only use the immediate reward.
seed_payload.prevention_rule: Whenever a Q-learning target is computed, zero the next-state bootstrap term when done=True.
seed_payload.canonical_symptom: terminal q-learning transition still includes gamma max(Q_next)
seed_payload.verification_steps: Run python examples/scenarios/q_learning_buggy.py and confirm terminal targets equal reward.

cases.title: Buggy DQN target-network leakage
cases.error_context: DQN TD targets should bootstrap from detached target-network values, not online-network values.
cases.expected_title: DQN TD target leaks online-network values instead of detached target-network values

seed_payload.title: DQN TD target leaks online-network values instead of detached target-network values
seed_payload.raw_error: AssertionError: DQN target uses online-network bootstrap value instead of detached target-network value.
seed_payload.canonical_fix: Select the greedy action with the online network if desired, but evaluate the bootstrap value with the detached target-network outputs.
seed_payload.prevention_rule: Keep online-network action selection and target-network bootstrap evaluation separated in DQN-style updates.
seed_payload.canonical_symptom: dqn target uses online bootstrap values instead of detached target-network values
seed_payload.verification_steps: Run python examples/scenarios/dqn_target_network_buggy.py and confirm the TD target uses target-network values.

cases.title: Buggy n-step return terminal masking
cases.error_context: N-step returns must stop bootstrapping after the first terminal transition inside the rollout.
cases.expected_title: N-step return bootstraps beyond terminal transition

seed_payload.title: N-step return bootstraps beyond terminal transition
seed_payload.raw_error: AssertionError: N-step return bootstraps past a terminal transition; expected terminal mask to stop recursion.
seed_payload.canonical_fix: Apply the done mask inside the n-step recursion so the bootstrap tail is zeroed after the first terminal transition.
seed_payload.prevention_rule: Every multi-step target should explicitly stop recursion when a terminal flag appears inside the rollout window.
seed_payload.canonical_symptom: n-step return continues bootstrapping after a terminal transition appears inside the rollout
seed_payload.verification_steps: Run python examples/scenarios/n_step_return_buggy.py and confirm the terminal step removes the bootstrap tail.

cases.title: Buggy PPO clipped surrogate
cases.error_context: PPO should minimize optimism by taking the minimum of clipped and unclipped objectives for positive advantages.
cases.expected_title: PPO clipped surrogate uses max instead of min

seed_payload.title: PPO clipped surrogate uses max instead of min
seed_payload.raw_error: AssertionError: PPO clipped objective uses max instead of min for positive advantages.
seed_payload.canonical_fix: For positive advantages, compute the PPO surrogate with the minimum of unclipped and clipped terms so the trust-region style clip is respected.
seed_payload.prevention_rule: Unit-test PPO clipped objective branches separately for positive and negative advantages.
seed_payload.canonical_symptom: ppo clipped surrogate uses the optimistic max branch and defeats clipping
seed_payload.verification_steps: Run python examples/scenarios/ppo_clip_objective_buggy.py and confirm the clipped branch caps the objective.

cases.title: Buggy GAE terminal masking
cases.error_context: GAE recursion should cut off at terminal boundaries before propagating next-state advantage.

seed_payload.title: GAE recursion ignores terminal mask
seed_payload.raw_error: AssertionError: GAE recursion propagates advantage across terminal boundary because done mask is ignored.
seed_payload.canonical_fix: Multiply both next-value and recursive advantage terms by the terminal mask before propagating GAE.
seed_payload.prevention_rule: Check GAE with terminal transitions explicitly and verify no next-state value leaks across episode boundaries.
seed_payload.canonical_symptom: gae recursion leaks next-state advantage across terminal transitions
seed_payload.verification_steps: Run python examples/scenarios/gae_terminal_mask_buggy.py and confirm terminal transitions cut off the recursion.

cases.title: Buggy actor-critic returns-vs-advantage
cases.error_context: Policy-gradient actor updates should use advantages instead of raw returns.
cases.expected_title: Actor-critic policy update uses returns instead of advantages

seed_payload.title: Actor-critic policy update uses returns instead of advantages
seed_payload.raw_error: AssertionError: Actor-critic policy loss is using returns instead of advantages; subtract critic values before policy update.
seed_payload.canonical_fix: Compute policy loss from advantages (returns - critic values) instead of raw returns.
seed_payload.prevention_rule: Keep actor and critic objectives separated: actor uses advantages, critic uses value targets.
seed_payload.canonical_symptom: actor-critic update couples the policy objective directly to raw returns
seed_payload.verification_steps: Run python examples/scenarios/actor_critic_buggy.py and confirm policy loss uses advantages.

cases.title: Buggy SAC temperature sign
cases.error_context: SAC temperature updates should use target_entropy - observed_entropy so low entropy increases exploration pressure.
cases.expected_title: SAC temperature update uses the wrong entropy residual sign

seed_payload.title: SAC temperature update uses the wrong entropy residual sign
seed_payload.raw_error: AssertionError: SAC temperature update uses the wrong sign; expected target_entropy - observed_entropy.
seed_payload.canonical_fix: Form the SAC temperature residual as target_entropy - observed_entropy so the alpha update moves in the correct exploration-restoring direction.
seed_payload.prevention_rule: Unit-test SAC alpha residual signs with both entropy-above-target and entropy-below-target cases.
seed_payload.canonical_symptom: sac alpha residual sign is inverted relative to the target entropy objective
seed_payload.verification_steps: Run python examples/scenarios/sac_alpha_sign_buggy.py and confirm the residual matches target_entropy - observed_entropy.

cases.title: Buggy TD3 target smoothing clip
cases.error_context: TD3 target policy smoothing noise must be clipped back into valid action bounds before critic target evaluation.
cases.expected_title: TD3 target policy smoothing misses action clipping

seed_payload.title: TD3 target policy smoothing misses action clipping
seed_payload.raw_error: AssertionError: TD3 target policy smoothing misses action clipping and exceeds action bounds.
seed_payload.canonical_fix: After adding TD3 smoothing noise, clip the target action back to the environment action bounds before computing critic targets.
seed_payload.prevention_rule: Always test TD3 target actions at the edge of the action range with positive and negative smoothing noise.
seed_payload.canonical_symptom: td3 target smoothing pushes target actions outside valid bounds because clipping is omitted
seed_payload.verification_steps: Run python examples/scenarios/td3_target_smoothing_buggy.py and confirm the target action is clipped to bounds.

cases.title: Buggy TD3 policy-delay schedule
cases.error_context: TD3 should update the actor only every policy_delay critic steps.
cases.expected_title: TD3 actor update ignores delayed policy schedule

seed_payload.title: TD3 actor update ignores delayed policy schedule
seed_payload.raw_error: AssertionError: TD3 actor update ignores policy_delay and runs on every critic step.
seed_payload.canonical_fix: Gate the TD3 actor update with the configured policy_delay so the actor is updated only on delayed critic steps.
seed_payload.prevention_rule: Cover TD3 update scheduling with a simple step-index unit test before training runs.
seed_payload.canonical_symptom: td3 actor updates execute every step instead of respecting the delayed policy schedule
seed_payload.verification_steps: Run python examples/scenarios/td3_policy_delay_buggy.py and confirm odd critic steps skip the actor update when policy_delay=2.

cases.title: Buggy off-policy importance correction
cases.error_context: Off-policy actor corrections should include clipped importance weights rather than raw TD errors alone.
cases.expected_title: Off-policy correction omits clipped importance weights

seed_payload.title: Off-policy correction omits clipped importance weights
seed_payload.raw_error: AssertionError: Off-policy correction omits clipped importance weights in the actor update.
seed_payload.canonical_fix: Multiply the off-policy actor correction term by the clipped importance weights before applying the update.
seed_payload.prevention_rule: Unit-test off-policy actor corrections with rho values below 1 so clipped-importance behavior is exercised.
seed_payload.canonical_symptom: off-policy actor correction uses raw td error and ignores clipped importance weights
seed_payload.verification_steps: Run python examples/scenarios/vtrace_importance_weights_buggy.py and confirm the actor term scales with clipped importance weights.
